hero.title: Ignite Your Next Career Chapter
hero.subtitle: Clarity. Direction. Momentum.
hero.description: NovaWork Global helps professionals navigate career change with a proven system that blends hands-on human experience in career coaching with intelligent AI tools, so you move forward with confidence and clarity.

trust.title: Trusted by Professionals Worldwide
trust.subtitle: Real results from real people who transformed their careers with our proven system
trust.testimonial: NovaWork really understands how to get the best out of their clients. They helped me successfully navigate my career options resulting in a new executive role with a Fortune 500 company. Their ability to challenge your assumptions and expand your world view while helping build and work a plan to pursue your ambitions were key in my successful transition. They know how to bring the best out of each person. Even during the most frustrating moments, they knew how to push past barriers and instill confidence through the entire process.

problem.descriptionPart1: Most people don't get stuck because they lack talent.
problem.descriptionPart2: They get stuck because they don't know which move makes sense next.
problem.card1: Unsure which role or industry fits you now
problem.card2: Impacted by layoffs, AI disruption, or market shifts
problem.card3: Torn between multiple paths with no clear direction

philosophy.quotePart1: We believe the future of work isn't about competing with AI, but

differentiator.title: Human Expertise + AI Support
differentiator.description: We combine 30+ years of hands-on career coaching with AI powered tools, so you get the depth of human insight and the speed of technology.
differentiator.humanCardText: Built by expert career coaches who've guided thousands through successful transitions. Real experience, proven frameworks.
differentiator.aiCardText: Smart automation handles the heavy lifting, ATS optimization, job matching, resume building support, so you move faster.
differentiator.pathCardText: Not generic advice. A tailored strategy that adapts to your background, goals, and timeline.
differentiator.resultText: You get expert-level guidance without waiting weeks for an available expert, and AI-speed execution without losing the human touch that actually makes career change work.

par.noStoriesHelp: Create stories to highlight your problem-solving skills.
par.problemHelp: What specific problem or situation did you face?
par.actionsHelp: What specific steps did YOU take? (Use active action verbs)
par.willDoAgainHelp: Mark if this is a type of work you enjoy and want to repeat.

errors.requiredFields: Please fill in Challenge and Result fields first

placeholders.whoYouAre: e.g., Senior Product Manager with 10+ years driving digital transformation in FinTech.

placeholders.problem: e.g., Product adoption was declining 15% QoQ due to poor onboarding UX

resources.resumeAudioDesc: Listen to expert tips on resume optimization while you commute or exercise.
resources.accomplishmentsDesc: Discover how to document and quantify your professional achievements effectively.
resources.interviewPrepDesc: A comprehensive guide to preparing for any type of interview with confidence.
resources.commonQuestionsDesc: Practice responses to the most frequently asked interview questions.
resources.bodyLanguageDesc: Learn non-verbal communication techniques that can make or break your interview.
resources.marketResearchDesc: How to research compensation trends and market rates for your target role.
resources.applicationsDesc: A systematic approach to applying for jobs that actually converts to interviews.
resources.linkedInDesc: Transform your LinkedIn profile into a powerful networking and job search tool.

accomplishmentBankLearnMore.heroTitle: Build a living portfolio of your professional wins
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.heroDescription: Capture your achievements, organize them with structure, and turn them into high-impact statements for resumes, interviews, LinkedIn, and career growth.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.snapshotOriginalText: Led reporting automation across sales operations, reducing manual work and improving delivery speed.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiOutput1: Improved reporting efficiency by automating sales workflows and reducing manual effort by 35%.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiOutput2: Streamlined cross-functional reporting processes, accelerating dashboard delivery for leadership teams.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiOutput3: Designed a scalable reporting approach that improved visibility, speed, and reporting accuracy.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.whatItIsText: The Accomplishment Bank is a structured space where you collect, refine, and reuse your most valuable professional achievements. Instead of starting from zero every time you update a resume or prepare for an interview, you build a reusable system of impact.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.whyLove1: No more trying to remember achievements under pressure
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.whyLove2: Better resume bullets and stronger interview answers
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.whyLove3: One accomplishment can become many strategic variations
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.whyItMattersTitle: A better way to communicate your value
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.captureText: Save your career wins in one structured place instead of losing them across old resumes, notes, or memory.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.organizeText: Refine and categorize your accomplishments so they are easier to reuse for resumes, interviews, and LinkedIn.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.leverageText: Turn your experience into a reusable portfolio of impact for new roles, promotions, and career transitions.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.twoWaysTitle: Choose the path that fits your situation
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.uploadText: Already have strong achievement-based content? Upload your resume and extract accomplishments into your bank automatically.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carText: Start from scratch using the Context, Action, Result method to create powerful accomplishment statements step by step.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carFrameworkTitle: Turn experience into clear accomplishment statements
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carFrameworkText: The CAR method helps you write stronger, more strategic accomplishments by breaking each story into three essential parts: Context, Action, and Result.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carCText: What was the situation, challenge, business need, or goal?
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carAText: What did you do specifically? What process, decision, or initiative did you lead or improve?
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.carRText: What changed? Show the measurable outcome, improvement, savings, growth, or impact.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiMultiplierTitle: One story becomes multiple high-impact versions
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiMultiplierText: After you enter one complete accomplishment story, AI can generate multiple polished variations tailored to different career goals and communication contexts.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.aiInputText: Led reporting automation across sales operations, reducing manual work and improving delivery speed.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.adaptTitle: The same accomplishment can highlight different strengths
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.leadershipText: Frame the accomplishment around ownership, direction, initiative, and team impact.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.analyticalText: Emphasize the problem-solving approach, data reasoning, metrics, and decision logic.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.communicationText: Show stakeholder alignment, collaboration, influence, and cross-functional execution.
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.ctaTitle: Start building your Accomplishment Bank today
accomplishmentBankLearnMore.ctaText: Stop relying on memory. Build a reusable portfolio of career wins that supports your resume, interview preparation, and next opportunity.

resumeBuilderLearnMore.heroDescription: Stop writing job descriptions. Start telling your accomplishment story. Our 4-step system transforms your career narrative into a powerful, ATS-optimized resume.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.blueprintSubtitle: Phase 1: Gathering & Refining Your Story • Step 4: Final Strategy
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step1Desc: Document companies, roles, years, and locations to capture all essential professional information.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step2Desc: Use the Context/Challenge + Actions + Results (CAR) system to build a repository of achievements.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step3Desc: Create a positioning paragraph that showcases your identity and incorporates essential ATS keywords.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.chooseFormatDesc: Select the format that best represents your career trajectory and goals.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.chronologicalBestFor: Professionals continuing in a similar career path.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.functionalBestFor: Career changers, versatile roles, project-based work, or international moves.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.accomplishmentMindsetDesc: Most resumes fail because they read like job descriptions. Our system shifts your mindset from listing duties to showcasing impact.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.mindsetPoint1: Stop listing what you did — show what you achieved.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.mindsetPoint2: Use the CAR system: Context + Actions + Results.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.mindsetPoint3: Build a lifetime repository of accomplishments.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.mindsetPoint4: ATS-optimized keywords built into every section.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.completeFrameworkSubtitle: Build the right resume, the right way.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step1DetailDesc: Document your career trajectory with precision and completeness.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step1Bullet1: List all companies, positions, and durations.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step2DetailDesc: Build a lifetime repository of career achievements using the Context/Challenge + Actions + Results system.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.carExample: "Led 10-person team to deliver platform 3 weeks early, saving $200K."
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step3DetailDesc: Create a positioning paragraph that showcases your identity and incorporates essential ATS keywords.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.profileBoxTitle: Your Professional Identity in One Powerful Paragraph
resumeBuilderLearnMore.profileBoxDesc: Write it yourself, follow our video instructions, or use our AI-powered questionnaire for guided generation. The result: a compelling profile that makes hiring managers stop and read.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.step4DetailDesc: Choose between a chronological or functional resume — or create both for a complete job search arsenal.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.chronologicalDesc: Best for professionals continuing in a similar career path.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.functionalDesc: Best for career changers, versatile roles, project-based work, or international moves.
resumeBuilderLearnMore.ctaDescription: Build a resume that tells your accomplishment story, not your job description.

careerVisionLearnMore.heroDescription: The foundational first step of your Career Orientation Program. Map who you are professionally — and where you want to go.
careerVisionLearnMore.infographicAlt: Ignite Your Next Career Chapter: The Skills & Interests Assessment
careerVisionLearnMore.twoPillarsTitle: Organize Your Career into Two Pillars
careerVisionLearnMore.twoPillarsSubtitle: Sorting your past experience and future aspirations into these two pillars creates immediate clarity.
careerVisionLearnMore.skillsFocus: Focus: What you know and have done repeatedly.
careerVisionLearnMore.interestsFocus: Focus: What you want to explore, learn, or continue doing.
careerVisionLearnMore.listCompetenciesDesc: Enter things you have done repeatedly or learned through extensive professional experience.
careerVisionLearnMore.leverageAIDesc: Click "Generate AI" to discover related keywords and specialized skills you may possess.
careerVisionLearnMore.financeExamplesDesc: Include specific terms like financial planning, Excel, reporting, and reconciliation.
careerVisionLearnMore.enjoyableSkillsDesc: Repeat the skills and knowledge from the first column that you actually enjoy doing.
careerVisionLearnMore.aspirationalInterestsDesc: Include skills you are interested in but have never practiced or learned before.
careerVisionLearnMore.interestAlignmentDesc: This column captures both current passions and future areas of growth.
careerVisionLearnMore.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to map your professional DNA.
careerVisionLearnMore.step1Desc: Enter at least three things you know how to do. These should be proven skills you have executed repeatedly or specific knowledge you have learned.
careerVisionLearnMore.step2Desc: Click the 'Generate AI' button to instantly brainstorm more ideas. The tool will auto-generate additional keywords, revealing related skills and knowledge areas you already possess but might not have thought to list.
careerVisionLearnMore.step3Desc: Bring over the skills and knowledge from the first column that you genuinely enjoy doing. Then add entirely new skills you have always been interested in — even if you have never practiced them.
careerVisionLearnMore.readyToLaunchSubtitle: Your assessment is complete when you have done all three.
careerVisionLearnMore.checkpoint1: Entered at least 3 proven skills or knowledge areas.
careerVisionLearnMore.checkpoint2: Used the 'Generate AI' button to expand your foundation.
careerVisionLearnMore.checkpoint3: Mapped your future by adding both enjoyed skills and new aspirations to your Interests.
careerVisionLearnMore.readyToLaunchFinal: Your assessment is complete. You are ready to ignite the next phase of the program.
careerVisionLearnMore.whatHappensNextDesc: Once you've completed the Skills & Interests Assessment, you'll unlock the full Career Vision — including your Job History Analysis and Ideal Work Preferences — to generate your personalized career profile.
careerVisionLearnMore.ctaDescription: Start the NovaWork Global Skills & Interests Assessment today.

profileLearnMore.heroDescription: A four-step structural blueprint to engineer the perfect resume introduction. Stop writing generic paragraphs — assemble interlocking parts.
profileLearnMore.snapshotDescription: The Professional Profile is the most important real estate on your resume. A short, targeted introduction designed to quickly and undeniably prove three things to a hiring manager.
profileLearnMore.architectureTitle: The Architecture of a Winning Profile
profileLearnMore.architectureSubtitle: Four interlocking blocks that work together as a system.
profileLearnMore.identityDesc: The first sentence serves a single purpose: explaining exactly who you are professionally. Do not overcomplicate it.
profileLearnMore.identityExample: "Service Business Leader and Management Consultant with local and international experience in consulting firms."
profileLearnMore.positioningDesc: Your positioning statement highlights a group of core skills that, when combined, make you uniquely equipped for the specific job you want.
profileLearnMore.positioningTip: Don't just list skills — state what those skills allow you to accomplish.
profileLearnMore.positioningExample: "Expert at successfully starting up, developing, and growing outsourcing service firms locally and internationally."
profileLearnMore.softSkillsDesc: Dedicate 3–4 short sentences to describing how you operate. These must directly align with the target job's requirements.
profileLearnMore.leadershipTo: Leading multicultural, cross-functional and remote teams
profileLearnMore.communicationTo: Negotiating with all organizational levels and diverse stakeholders
profileLearnMore.problemSolvingTo: Effectively managing crises and creatively solving problems
profileLearnMore.areasDesc: A dedicated keyword section that helps both human recruiters scanning for specific terms and ATS systems categorizing your application.
profileLearnMore.executionRule1: Format as a distinct, separated list.
profileLearnMore.executionRule2: Use vertical pipes ( | ) for clean, scannable separation.
profileLearnMore.executionRule3: Include only the highest-priority industry terminology.
profileLearnMore.areasExample: "Areas of Excellence: International Management Consulting | Global Scope | Budgeting | P&L | Project Management"
profileLearnMore.matrixSubtitle: Each block targets a specific decision-maker in the hiring process.
profileLearnMore.positioningObj: Prove fitness for the specific role
profileLearnMore.teardownSubtitle: See how the four blocks come together in a real profile.
profileLearnMore.softSkillsLabel: Soft skills applied to real-world scenarios
profileLearnMore.role1Line1: Service Business Leader and Management Consultant with local and international experience in consulting firms.
profileLearnMore.role1Line2: Expert at successfully starting up, developing, and growing outsourcing service firms locally and internationally.
profileLearnMore.role1Line3: Skilled at leading multicultural… closing favorable deals, coaching and mentoring others…
profileLearnMore.role1Line4: Areas of Excellence: Budgeting | P&L | Savings Maximization…
profileLearnMore.role2Line1: Project Manager/Engineer with regional experience in the medical equipment, industrial equipment, oil & gas, and power & light industries.
profileLearnMore.role2Line2: Expert at improving processes, performing needs assessments, and proposing solutions for clients…
profileLearnMore.role2Line3: Skilled at leading multicultural teams… creatively solving problems… with a strong client/customer orientation. Bilingual (EN/ES).
profileLearnMore.role2Line4: Areas of Excellence: Project Management | Needs Assessment | Supply Chain | KPIs…
profileLearnMore.ctaDescription: You now have the blueprint. Deconstruct your current profile and rebuild it step-by-step to command the attention your experience deserves.

resumeTypeLearnMore.heroDescription: Choosing the right resume format is a strategic decision. Learn which structure best tells your professional story and maximizes your chances of getting the interview.
resumeTypeLearnMore.twoFormatsSubtitle: Both formats use the same content — they differ in how that content is organized and presented.
resumeTypeLearnMore.chronologicalDesc: Lists work experience in reverse chronological order — most recent position first.
resumeTypeLearnMore.functionalDesc: Groups accomplishments by skill category — shifting focus from when to what you achieved.
resumeTypeLearnMore.chronoBest1: Professionals continuing in the same career path
resumeTypeLearnMore.chronoBest3: Roles in traditional or corporate industries
resumeTypeLearnMore.chronologicalStructure: Contact → Summary → Work Experience (reverse order) → Education → Skills
resumeTypeLearnMore.funcBest1: Career changers moving to a new industry
resumeTypeLearnMore.functionalStructure: Contact → Summary → Skill Groups + Accomplishments → Work History (brief) → Education
resumeTypeLearnMore.architectureDesc: Your resume format is the architecture that either opens or closes doors. A mismatched format — no matter how strong your accomplishments — can prevent your story from being heard.
resumeTypeLearnMore.architecturePoint1: The format signals your career narrative before recruiters read a word.
resumeTypeLearnMore.architecturePoint2: ATS systems parse formats differently — choose strategically.
resumeTypeLearnMore.architecturePoint3: Career changers who use chronological resumes are often auto-rejected.
resumeTypeLearnMore.architecturePoint4: Both formats use the same CAR accomplishments — just organized differently.
resumeTypeLearnMore.ctaDescription: Select the structure that best tells your story and generates your professional resume.

workExperienceLearnMore.heroDescription: Moving from task lists to impact statements. Stop describing what you did — start proving what you delivered.
workExperienceLearnMore.anatomySubtitle: Every role you list is built on two foundational pillars.
workExperienceLearnMore.basicsDesc: These fundamental data points anchor your experience in time and space.
workExperienceLearnMore.impactDesc: The compelling narrative that showcases the depth of your experience to employers.
workExperienceLearnMore.purposeDesc: The specific reason you were hired. Your unique contribution to the organization.
workExperienceLearnMore.scopeDesc: The scale, budget, and context of your playing field. Numbers prove authority.
workExperienceLearnMore.impactCardDesc: The compelling narrative that showcases the true depth of your experience to employers.
workExperienceLearnMore.philosophySubtitle: Responsibilities blend in. Impact stands out.
workExperienceLearnMore.genericToPowerfulSubtitle: Purpose reveals why you were placed in the role — not just what you did.
workExperienceLearnMore.oldWayDesc: Generic task — blends into every other resume.
workExperienceLearnMore.novaWorkWayText: "Led a regional sales team to increase market share by 20% in one year."
workExperienceLearnMore.novaWorkWayDesc: Specific, measurable outcome — stands out immediately.
workExperienceLearnMore.quantifyingScopeSubtitle: Scope provides the sheer size, budget, and context of your operations.
workExperienceLearnMore.scopeExample1Desc: Managed a $5 million budget for a nationwide marketing campaign.
workExperienceLearnMore.scopeExample2Desc: Oversaw operations for a team of 50 employees across three regions.
workExperienceLearnMore.diagnosticMatrixSubtitle: Ask the right questions to transform any entry.
workExperienceLearnMore.taskQuestion: What did I do all day?
workExperienceLearnMore.purposeQuestion: Why did they need me specifically?
workExperienceLearnMore.scopeQuestion: How big was my playing field?
workExperienceLearnMore.secretWeaponDesc: Two paths to craft the perfect impact paragraph. Both ensure your resume showcases your unique impact and the true depth of your experience.
workExperienceLearnMore.manualModeDesc: Write the paragraph yourself using the Purpose + Scope framework.
workExperienceLearnMore.aiAssistDesc: Take the built-in AI questionnaire → Let the system draft the paragraph → Refine and edit as needed.
workExperienceLearnMore.ctaDescription: Use the Purpose + Scope framework to transform every role into a compelling story employers can't ignore.

strategicJobSearchLearnMore.heroDescription: A strategic job search always outperforms a desperate one. Stop "spraying and praying" and join the top 1% of candidates using a battle-tested framework.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.aiMatchingDesc: Upload your resume to let AI scan the market and rank roles by profile relevance.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.marketResearchDesc: Understand industry trends and growth sectors before investing energy into applications.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.beatOddsDesc: Optimize resumes for ATS to improve the standard 1-5% response rate.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.hiddenMarketDesc: Partner with recruiters who fill roles before they are ever publicly advertised.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.networkingTitle: Networking is the Most Powerful Tool
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.networkingDesc: Focus on building genuine, mutually beneficial professional relationships rather than transactional favors.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.digitalFootprintDesc: Optimize LinkedIn and personal portfolios to be found by recruiters before you even apply.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.realityDesc: Most professionals rely entirely on online applications, facing high competition across global boards and ATS filters.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.realityPoint1: 1% to 5% success rate for blind applications.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.realityPoint2: ATS systems filter resumes before human review.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.realityPoint3: Near impossibility of standing out in a crowded pile.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.aiEngineTitle: Let technology do the heavy lifting.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.aiEngineDesc: Our AI Engine acts as your tireless research assistant, scanning the market and surfacing high-alignment opportunities while you focus on preparation.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.scanDesc: AI analyzes your skills, experience, and background instantly.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.curateDesc: Surfaces hidden roles and ranks them by true profile relevance.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.executeDesc: Spend less time searching and more time winning offers.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.completeFrameworkSubtitle: Do the right things, in the right order.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.mythText: "I'll know the right job when I see it."
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.realityText: Determine what you're looking for before applying.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step1Bullet1: Analyze career tracks and industry trends.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step1Bullet3: Map roles that align with skills and ambitions.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step2Desc: Online applications are a meaningful part of your strategy—not the entirety of it.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step3Desc: Unlock jobs that are never posted publicly by engaging with executive recruiters and agency specialists.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.unlistedDesc: Differentiate between agency recruiters and internal HR to communicate value efficiently and get on their radar.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step4Desc: Build relationships over time. Networking is not about asking for favors—it's about informational connection and peer positioning.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.step5Desc: Recruiters research you online before they pick up the phone. Be found, be findable, and be compelling.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.linkedinDesc: Surfaces your profile in recruiter searches 24/7.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.thoughtLeadershipDesc: Personal portfolio and constant professional footprint.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.ctaTitle: Do the right things, in the right order.
strategicJobSearchLearnMore.ctaDescription: Find the right job faster, smarter, and with total confidence.

smartSearch.title: Smart Job Search
smartSearch.description: Generate an optimized Google Jobs search link to find the latest postings across all platforms (LinkedIn, Glassdoor, ZipRecruiter, etc.).

atsAnalyzer.title: ATS Analyzer
atsAnalyzer.description: Compare resume vs. job description before applying.

resumeChecklist.bannerTitle: 80% of Resumes Are Rejected by ATS
resumeChecklist.bannerDesc: Use this checklist EVERY time you apply to ensure your resume gets through automated screening and into human hands.
resumeChecklist.stepInstructions: Check off each item before sending your application

progress.title: Verification Progress
progress.doneMsg: Ready to apply! Your resume is optimized.

proTip.title: Pro Tip — The 80% Referral Rule
proTip.desc: Even with a perfectly tailored resume, your callback rate without a referral is only 1-2%. WITH a referral, it jumps to 80%. Always try to find a referral before applying.
proTip.li1: Check LinkedIn for 1st or 2nd degree connections
proTip.li2: Reach out to alumni from your school
proTip.li3: Ask your network for warm introductions
proTip.li4: Message employees on LinkedIn with a personalized note

beforeStart.title: Before You Start
beforeStart.subtitle: Research before touching your resume
beforeStart.item1: Read the full job description 3 times
beforeStart.item1Desc: Identify requirements, responsibilities and company culture
beforeStart.item2: Identify the top 5-10 keywords from the JD
beforeStart.item2Desc: Use them when rewriting; they must appear exactly as listed
beforeStart.item3Desc: Know their mission, recent news, and why you want to work there

resumeOptimization.title: Resume Optimization
resumeOptimization.subtitle: Tailor your resume to the role
resumeOptimization.item1: Match your job titles to their language
resumeOptimization.item1Desc: If they say "Product Manager," don't use "Product Lead"
resumeOptimization.item2: Include ALL required skills mentioned in the JD
resumeOptimization.item2Desc: If you have the skill, it MUST be on your resume
resumeOptimization.item3: Use their exact keywords (especially for ATS)
resumeOptimization.item3Desc: Copy exact phrases like "Agile methodology" vs "Agile processes"
resumeOptimization.item4Desc: Use metrics: "Increased revenue by 40%" not "Improved revenue"
resumeOptimization.item5Desc: First 3 lines should mirror the job requirements
resumeOptimization.item6Desc: If it doesn't help you get THIS job, consider removing it

atsFormatting.title: ATS-Friendly Formatting
atsFormatting.subtitle: Make sure robots can read your resume
atsFormatting.item2Desc: PDF preferred, but some ATS prefer .docx - check job posting
atsFormatting.item3Desc: Avoid fancy fonts that ATS can't read

fileNaming.title: File Naming & Submission
fileNaming.subtitle: Final checks before you hit send
fileNaming.item3Desc: Always maintain your master resume separately

1.title: Work Experience Outline
1.content: In the first part, you'll outline your work experience. This is where you list the companies and roles you've held, along with the key details like the company name, position, years, and locations.

2.title: Accomplishment Bank
2.content: In the Accomplishment Bank, you'll gather all the major achievements from your career. Build them through the CAR system (Challenge + Actions + Result) or import from an existing resume.

3.title: Professional Profile
3.content: Build the reader's first impression with a positioning paragraph that includes ATS keywords. Create it yourself, follow video instructions, or use our AI questionnaire.

4.title: Resume Format Selection
4.content: Choose between a chronological resume (ideal for similar career paths) or a functional resume (great for career changers or project-based work).

backDashboard.title: Return to Dashboard
backDashboard.content: Head back to your main dashboard to access other sections or view your overall progress.

navTabs.title: Resume Sections
navTabs.content: Navigate between different sections of your resume using these tabs.

sectionTitle.title: Work Experience Builder
sectionTitle.content: This is where you build your career history. Add each role you've held to create a comprehensive work timeline.

videoChips.title: Contextual Videos
videoChips.content: Watch short videos to understand key concepts. "Job Purpose" explains how to define your role impact.

importResume.title: Import from Resume
importResume.content: Have an existing resume? Import it to automatically populate your work history.

addExperience.title: Add Work Experience
addExperience.content: Manually add your work history here. Capture the company, your title, dates, and key accomplishments.

experienceList.title: Your Experience Cards
experienceList.content: Each card represents a role in your career. Click Edit to modify or Delete to remove.

journey.title: Your Career Vision Journey
journey.subtitle: Complete these sections to discover your ideal career path
journey.skillsSubtitle: List what you know and what you would do again
journey.jobHistorySubtitle: Reflect on past roles to identify patterns
journey.completeSubtitle: You've completed all sections. View your comprehensive career profile now!

welcome.title: Discover Your Career Vision
welcome.subtitle: Find the intersection of what you're good at and what genuinely excites you
welcome.whenAligned: When these two align, you find your
welcome.clarityFirstStep: Clarity is the first step to landing the right job
welcome.skipNote: You can always start or skip this later from your dashboard

skillsValues.title: Skills & Interests
skillsValues.subtitle: Identify what you're good at and what excites you
skillsValues.knowYourValue: Know your value before the interview
skillsValues.skillsDescription: Make a list of your skills, knowledge and competencies. Those things you are very good at from practice or study. Mention as many as possible.
skillsValues.interestsDescription: Choose from your skills and knowledge the ones you enjoy the most. Add other skills and knowledge you would like to have but you don't now.
skillsValues.aiSuggestionsDesc: Get personalized suggestions to expand your profile
skillsValues.greatOverlap: Great! You've identified where your skills and interests overlap!
skillsValues.addAtLeast3: Add at least 3 items to each category to discover where they intersect.
skillsValues.minItemsWarning: Please add at least 3 items to each category before saving
skillsValues.savedSuccess: Your skills and interests have been saved!
skillsValues.savedError: Failed to save. Please try again.

summaryVenn.title: The "Sweet Spot": Where Capability Meets Passion

hub.title: Job Search & Application Suite
hub.subtitle: Your dashboard for landing the job. Plan, track, analyze, and prepare.
hub.frameworkStat: Success, getting called 75% faster than most
hub.aiMatchingDesc: Auto-search Google Jobs via SerpAPI based on your profile skills & preferences.
hub.step1Desc: Define your target market (Companies, Industries, Roles) and strategy. Start here for focus.
hub.step2Desc: Track applications, leverage referrals, and analyze JDs in one place.
hub.step3Desc: Target recruiters with smart filters and access top firm rankings.
hub.step4Desc: Access the hidden job market with the 60-Day Plan and 90-Sec Story.
hub.step5Desc: Optimize your LinkedIn profile and personal brand to attract recruiters.

checklist.header: 80% of Resumes Are Rejected by ATS
checklist.subtitle: Use this checklist EVERY time you apply to ensure your resume gets through automated screening and into human hands.

readJD.title: Read the full job description 3 times
readJD.desc: Understand requirements, responsibilities, and company culture

keywords.title: Identify top 5-10 keywords from the JD
keywords.desc: Use JD Analyzer tool or manually extract key skills and requirements

research.title: Research the company
research.desc: Know their mission, recent news, and why you want to work there

jobTitles.title: Match your job titles to their language
jobTitles.desc: If they say "Product Manager," don't use "Product Lead"

allSkills.title: Include ALL required skills mentioned in the JD
allSkills.desc: If you have the skill, it MUST be on your resume

exactKeywords.title: Use their exact keywords (especially for ATS)
exactKeywords.desc: Copy exact phrases like "Agile methodology" vs "Agile processes"

quantify.title: Quantify your accomplishments
quantify.desc: Use metrics: "Increased revenue by 40%" not "Improved revenue"

summary.title: Tailor your summary/profile section
summary.desc: First 3 lines should mirror the job requirements

removeIrrelevant.title: Remove irrelevant experience
removeIrrelevant.desc: If it doesn't help you get THIS job, consider removing it

saveFormat.title: Save as .docx or .pdf
saveFormat.desc: PDF preferred, but some ATS prefer .docx - check job posting

standardFonts.title: Use standard fonts (Arial, Calibri, Times)
standardFonts.desc: Avoid fancy fonts that ATS can't read

keepOriginal.title: Keep original version
keepOriginal.desc: Always maintain your master resume separately

proTip.title: Pro Tip: The 80% Referral Rule
proTip.body: Even with a perfectly tailored resume, your callback rate without a referral is only 1-2%. WITH a referral, it jumps to 80%. Always try to find a referral before applying.
proTip.tip1: Check LinkedIn for 1st or 2nd degree connections
proTip.tip2: Reach out to alumni from your school
proTip.tip3: Ask your network for warm introductions
proTip.tip4: Message employees on LinkedIn with a personalized note

accomplishmentLibrary.title: Accomplishment Library
accomplishmentLibrary.subtitle: Your personal bank of achievements — organized, tagged, and ready for any resume.
accomplishmentLibrary.importNone: No new accomplishments to import — all are already in your library.
accomplishmentLibrary.noAccomplishmentsHelp: Start building your library by adding accomplishments or importing them from your work experience.
accomplishmentLibrary.autoAssembleHelp: Enter a target job title and let AI pick the best accomplishments for your resume.
accomplishmentLibrary.bulletPlaceholder: e.g., Led team of 12 to deliver payment system, reducing transaction time by 40%
accomplishmentLibrary.groupingPlaceholder: Click a button above or type a prompt below to group your accomplishments.
accomplishmentLibrary.saveGroupDescription: This will save a snapshot of the {{count}} categories and their accomplishments exactly as generated, so you can review them later.
accomplishmentLibrary.groupSavedSuccess: Group saved successfully. You can find it in the "Saved Groups" tab.
accomplishmentLibrary.groupSaveError: There was an error saving the group. Ensure you created the database table.
